results.name: Login page renders
results.reasoning: The login page displays correctly with the expected split-screen design. Left panel shows dark branding with 'Sportsphere' logo, compelling tagline 'The Sports Community Built for Athletes', feature descriptions, and live statistics. Right panel contains functional sign-in form with email/password fields, sign-in button, and account creation link. The live stream widget shows real data (NBA Pre-season Training Analysis with 2.4K viewers). All elements are properly styled and functional.

results.name: Invalid credentials rejected
results.reasoning: Error handling is working correctly - the red error toast 'Incorrect email or password.' is displayed at the top of the page, user remains on the login page, and the form is still accessible for retry attempts.

results.name: Valid login redirects to Feed
results.reasoning: The authenticated app is properly displayed with left sidebar navigation (Feed, Explore, Reels, etc.), main feed content showing real posts including Marcus Silva's soccer post with image and engagement options, story carousel at top with user avatars, and right sidebar with Sports News section. All elements are functioning and showing actual content, not empty states or loading spinners.

results.name: Session persists on refresh
results.reasoning: The page shows an authenticated feed with working features: user stories at top, post composition box, feed filtering tabs (For You, Following, All, Basketball, Soccer, Football), a real post from Marcus Silva with engagement options, sidebar navigation with all menu items, and live sports news feed on the right. All elements indicate proper authentication state is maintained after refresh.

results.name: Sign-up form has role selection
results.reasoning: The sign-up form is properly displayed with 'Create Account' tab active, showing all 4 role selection cards (Athlete, Coach, Organization, Parent) with appropriate icons and descriptions. The form includes proper section header 'I am joining as a...' and 'Sign in' link for existing users. All expected UI elements are present and functional.

results.name: Logout actually logs out
results.reasoning: Landing page displays correctly with proper dark theme, shows Sportsphere branding, clear value proposition text, functional Get Started and Sign In buttons, and copyright footer. No authenticated content visible, indicating proper logged-out state.

results.name: Auth guard blocks Feed when logged out
results.reasoning: Landing page displays correctly with Sportsphere branding, appropriate dark theme, clear value proposition text, functional Get Started and Sign In buttons, and proper copyright footer. The auth guard is working as expected by showing the landing page to unauthenticated users instead of protected content.
